title: Use local civil double-hour or true solar time

positions.summary: Validate the IANA local civil time and map its hour to the project's 13 double-hour indices.
Correct civil time using longitude and apparent-solar-time policy before selecting a double hour.

default_policy.rationale: The project-native foundation accepts a validated local civil date and explicit time index; no solar correction is implemented.

user_disclosure: The chart uses validated local civil time; true solar time is not applied.
